snippet: Edenred Belgium Login to your MyEdenred account Hello, You have just applied to log into your MyEdenred user account. To strengthen the security of your account, we require a two-step authentication
subject: Login to your MyEdenred user account
body:
Edenred Belgium

( https://www.edenred.be/fr/home )

Confirmation de création de votre compte MyEdenred

Login to your MyEdenred account

 

Hello,

 

You have just applied to log into your MyEdenred user account.

 

To strengthen the security of your account, we require a two-step authentication process.

 

👉 To validate your authentication and log in, copy this verification code into the login window :

 

255264
This secure connection link has a time-limited duration of 60 minutes. If it expires, repeat the authentication procedure on www.myedenred.be ( https://www.myedenred.be ).

 

When you connect, you will have the option of saving your browser as your trusted browser to avoid this procedure for 90 days.

 

If this connection attempt does not come from you, please ignore this e-mail.

 

Yours sincerely
The Edenred team

Edenred Belgium - 165 Boulevard du Souverain, 1160 Bruxelles

 

Privacy notice ( https://www.edenred.be/fr/privacy-policy )   Mentions légales ( https://www.edenred.be/fr/mentions-legales )   MyEdenred ( https://sso.eu.edenred.io/login?ReturnUrl=%2Fconnect%2Fauthorize%2Fcallback%3Fclient_id%3D12e7e1dd73e64735a1ee51f73bf9a3a5%26response_type%3Dcode%26scope%3Dopenid%2520%2520autoconnect%26redirect_uri%3Dhttps%253A%252F%252Fwww.myedenred.be%252FAccount%252FSignInCallback%26state%3D4322eeebac8b47688df86b57d6a597a0%26nonce%3Df9563cf017d841a38ab9fbe299ed5d66%26acr_values%3Dtenant%253Abe-ben%26ui_locales%3DFR )   MyEdenred app ( https://mobile.edenred.be/ )

Conformément aux conditions d’utilisation de votre carte Edenred, cet e-mail vous est envoyé dans le cadre d’une communication de service, destinée à renforcer la facilité d’utilisation de votre carte Edenred.
